en.extract:
The yellow-crowned whitestart (Myioborus flavivertex), Santa Marta whitestart or yellow-crowned redstart, is a species of bird in the family Parulidae. It is endemic to the highland forest and woodland in the Santa Marta Mountains in Colombia.

The '''yellow-crowned whitestart''' ('''''Myioborus flavivertex'''''), '''Santa Marta whitestart''' or '''yellow-crowned redstart''', is a species of bird in the family [[Parulidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to the highland forest and woodland in the [[Sierra Nevada de Santa Marta|Santa Marta Mountains]] in [[Colombia]].
